children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is hereby imposed a tax of $3 per passenger on a covered voyage.

children.heading: By whom paid
children.label: b By whom paid
children.text: The tax imposed by this section shall be paid by the person providing the covered voyage.

children.heading: Time of imposition
children.label: c Time of imposition
children.text: The tax imposed by this section shall be imposed only once for each passenger on a covered voyage, either at the time of first embarkation or disembarkation in the United States.
